policyname: Users can view related friend requests
Users can add their own friendship rows

with_check:
((auth.uid() = user_id) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM friend_requests
  WHERE ((friend_requests.status = 'pending'::text) AND (friend_requests.receiver_id = auth.uid()) AND (friend_requests.sender_id = friends.user_id) AND (friends.friend_id = friend_requests.receiver_id)))))
